name: Azure Landing Zone Foundation
strategicIntent: Establish a standardised Azure landing zone blueprint for all workloads, ensuring consistent governance, security, and cost management.
problemStatement: Inconsistent Azure subscription provisioning leads to governance gaps, uncontrolled costs, and security baseline deviations across teams.

useCases.use: New Azure workload deployments requiring governance baseline
useCases.dontUse: Legacy on-premises only applications with no cloud migration plan

components: Azure Management Groups — hierarchical governance structure
Azure Policy — compliance enforcement and guardrails
Azure Cost Management — budget alerts and cost tracking
interactionSteps: Team requests landing zone via self-service portal
Platform team reviews and approves workload classification
Terraform provisions subscription under correct management group
Azure Policy assigns baseline security and compliance controls
Cost Management budget alerts configured for workload team
securityConsiderations: All subscriptions must be under management group hierarchy
Baseline security policies applied at management group level
Resource locks applied to prevent accidental deletion of critical resources
Diagnostic settings auto-configured for Log Analytics

guardrails.rule: All subscriptions must have cost alerts configured
Baseline Azure Policy set must be assigned
Resource naming must follow McCain naming convention

exceptionProcess: Contact Cloud Platform team for variance review. Document business justification and target compliance date.
